environment.suites: opportunity-build-packet 2/2 (salon compile->packet->plan carries protected decisions and the read-only atlas query; packet name path-escape refused), opportunity-compiler 4/4 regression, typecheck:public and typecheck:component exit 0; token refactor computed-style harness reports 0 diffs over 54 themed selectors in both light and dark
environment.evidenceBoundary: Proves the Decide to Build packet materialization carries the OpportunityContract boundary into a plan-accepted product contract, and that the template token refactor preserved rendered output. It does not run the frontend tournament or certify any application; the token check was a manual computed-style audit, not a committed test; EASE_NOT_CERTIFIED stands.
